title: I'll pull tonight's logs and break it down properly.

turns.agentText:
I'll pull tonight's logs and break it down properly.

Let me narrow to tonight's runs.

Tonight's run is Charrmander Harasho's (squad 44). Pulling the breakdown.

Outnumbered and beaten — 3-12 on the night. Let me pull recent nights for a trend chart.

Tonight was a genuine wipefest — here's the chart and the breakdown. Building the trend first.

# Tonight was a stomping: 3–12 on the night, K/D collapsed to 0.29 — our worst in two weeks.

Charrmander's run logged 15 fights on Jun 19, going 3 wins / 12 losses while outnumbered the whole night (avg 44 vs 51). The squad bled **435 deaths and 648 downs** against just **125 enemy kills** — we actually downed 316 of them but converted only ~40% into kills, while 67% of our own downs got finished. That's a peel-and-cleave failure, not a damage problem. Data is complete — no skipped or partial runs.

The bottom didn't fall out of our output; it fell out of our survivability. Here's the K/D line across the last five nights — Jun 19 is a cliff off a 5.72 night on Jun 18:

{{figure}}

**Damage & pressure — top 10 of 46**

| Player | Spec | Down contrib | Deaths |
|---|---|---|---|
| undiee.3146 | Tempest | 741,415 | 9 |
| Mes.1906 | Tempest | 728,924 | 10 |
| mememe.5239 | Amalgam | 717,616 | 11 |
| BreakN.5496 | Berserker | 664,427 | 9 |
| Aeri.4529 | Reaper | 574,684 | 11 |
| Fibbs.1623 | Tempest | 488,431 | 10 |
| Rojeb.4897 | Reaper | 393,248 | 10 |
| Vettexl.9726 | Firebrand | 350,517 | 9 |
| VincentCross.1469 | Tempest | 326,313 | 9 |
| DraGonfly.9317 | Luminary | 257,748 | 10 |

**Support — top 10 of 46** (stability isn't in the AxiBridge export, so it's not columned here)

| Player | Spec | Strips | Cleanses | Healing |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Arx.9785 | Druid | 8 | 1,604 | 3,896,332 |
| kroft.5946 | Druid | 2 | 1,430 | 3,220,615 |
| Sselnoisiv.6130 | Druid | 5 | 1,203 | 3,018,359 |
| Revan Malise.5107 | Specter | 3 | 830 | 2,229,604 |
| calmy.5432 | Druid | 2 | 1,548 | 2,025,542 |
| Jax Blake.7250 | Vindicator | 1 | 253 | 1,895,610 |
| Voyl.5241 | Troubadour | 14 | 574 | 1,550,493 |
| Bouzouki.7598 | Specter | 5 | 614 | 1,477,897 |
| South.4867 | Druid | 9 | 1,313 | 1,417,213 |
| AMINE.5278 | Necromancer | 877 | 94 | 1,860,339 (dmg) |

Full 46-player roster is browsable as a card in the Actions panel.

**What went well**
- **Boon strip was not the problem** — 877 strips from AMINE (Necro), 693 Anhuur, 650 pillo, plus four Reapers/Scourges over 400. The strip core showed up.
- **Backline damage held** — undiee, Mes and Fibbs (Tempests) all cleared 488k+ down contribution; raw pressure was there.
- **Healers pumped** — Arx 3.9M, kroft 3.2M, Sselnoisiv 3.0M healing. The druids weren't slacking; they were drowning.

**What to improve**
- **Death rate is the headline failure** — ~29 squad deaths *per fight* on a 44-man squad. We're getting bombed and not peeling downs. Highest-leverage area by far.
- **Down conversion was one-sided** — we downed 316 but killed 125; enemies killed 435 of our 648 downs. We need bodies committed to stomps/rezzes, not chasing more downs.
- **harasho.4281 (Troubadour) posted only 43 cleanses / 180k healing** — bottom-tier for a heal/boon Troub. Either bar/role got mixed up or they were playing offensive on a support chassis; recheck the build.
- **Tensauce.2946 (Druid) logged all zeros** — 0 damage, 0 healing, 0 combat time. DC'd or AFK the whole run; confirm and drop from the count.

**Highest-leverage fix for next week:** stop the bleed at the point of contact. We had the strips, damage and healing — what we lacked was peel and stomp discipline while outnumbered 44-vs-51. Assign a couple of bruisers/supports to peel-and-stomp duty and call hard disengages instead of trading into a bigger blob. Survivability, not output, is what cost us tonight.

data.title: EWW K/D ratio by night (enemy deaths ÷ squad deaths)
